title: Feedback from Peak Outfitters — Dashboards
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: Peak Outfitters (SMB)
NPS score: 3
Product area: Dashboards

Comment: The dashboard takes 5 seconds to load when I have more than 8 widgets. It's unusable for our morning standup.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Global search across workspaces'.
